temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A man with graying hair, wearing a gray suit jacket over a light-colored collared shirt, walks with a grim and determined expression. The scene is bathed in a sickly green light, creating a tense and ominous atmosphere. The camera follows him as he moves from left to right. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a serious and suspenseful tone, introducing a key character who appears to be on a mission or heading towards a confrontation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to play, building tension.)
(00:04-00:07) The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing the man is walking through an outdoor area at night, next to a building with barred windows. Two other men, one in a dark shirt and another in a black hoodie, are now visible behind him, following him closely. The man in the suit maintains his serious, forward-looking expression. (Storyline: The introduction of two followers confirms that the man in the suit is the leader of a group, and they are all moving with a clear, shared purpose.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, suspenseful music continues, with a subtle, rhythmic beat added to increase the sense of impending action.)
